form_name: R2R - General Ledger - Accounting & Payroll, recurring

questions.text: What does the Ledger Group field in the document header determine?
options: Which department the journal belongs to
Which fiscal year the posting is for
Which ledger is posted to in the case of manual postings
Which currency is used for the posting

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT true about document types? in OI management account?
Which of the following is NOT true about document types?
options: They classify and distinguish business transactions
They are defined at a local level
They apply to all company codes

questions.text: What is recommended for accruals reversal?
options: Reversing at the end of each month

questions.text: Which document type is assigned to auto-reversal entries in Blackline?
Which of the following accounts is likely controlled by GL account configuration for auto-posting from SD?
For postings that need to be cleared by ledger, what also needs to be done by ledger?
Tax relevant GL codes can post by ledger.
Document number range is defined for a fiscal year as best practice.
First Currency in Non-leading ledger is the same as 1st local currency in Leading Ledger.
